title: CC Flashcard
description: Schema for a single flashcard in the CC Flashcards deck.

id.description: Stable opaque identifier. Format: 'cc-' followed by lowercase alphanumeric characters (e.g., ULID-derived).

front.description: The term or concept on the front of the card.

back.description: The definition on the back of the card. For answer_type=verbatim, MUST equal source_excerpt byte-for-byte.

source_doc.description: NIST publication identifier. Example: 'NIST SP 800-27 Rev A'.

source_section.description: Optional section reference within source_doc. Example: 'Section 2.3'.

source_excerpt.description: The canonical verbatim text extracted from the source document. Used as the source of truth for verification.

source_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the extracted source document (Markdown) at the time of card verification. Mismatch triggers re-verification.

answer_type.description: verbatim: back === source_excerpt. paraphrased: back is derived from source_excerpt under the rules in AGENTS.md.

primary_domain.description: ISC2 CC exam domain. 1=Security Principles, 2=BC/DR/IR, 3=Access Controls, 4=Network Security, 5=Security Operations.

secondary_domains.description: Optional additional domains the concept touches.
